channel.title: Ubuntu on dmontalvoglz
channel.description: Recent content in Ubuntu on dmontalvoglz

item.title: Disable Plymouth boot screen on Ubuntu
item.description: What is Plymouth booting screen? Usually a fresh install of Ubuntu Linux contains a nice booting screen that hides the process of booting up, as cool as it may look it can hinder the booting time on old computers (you would barely notice it if you are using a high end pc) but also I really like to see the terminal doing the checks on every boot so I always end up disabling this feature.
